import React from 'react'; const InvoicePreview = ({ invoice }) => { const handlePrint = () => { window.print(); }; const whatsappMessage = `Hello ${invoice.customerName}, your bill amount is ₹${invoice.finalTotal}. Discount: ₹${invoice.discount}. Thank you.`; const whatsappUrl = `https://wa.me/91${invoice.customerPhone}?text=${encodeURIComponent(whatsappMessage)}`; return (

INVOICE

#{invoice.id}

Sohail Mulani

Electrician Specialist

Nashik, Maharashtra

Phone: 7498045041

Bill To:

{invoice.customerName}

{invoice.customerPhone}

{invoice.customerAddress}

Date:

{invoice.date}

{invoice.items.map((item, idx) => ( ))}
Item Description Qty Rate Amount
{item.name} {item.quantity} ₹{item.rate} ₹{item.amount}
Subtotal: ₹{invoice.subtotal}
Discount: - ₹{invoice.discount}
Total Amount: ₹{invoice.finalTotal}

Payment Methods

GPay / PhonePe: 7498045041

"Quality work is our signature."

Thank you for choosing Sohail Mulani Electrician Services!

Send to WhatsApp
); }; export default InvoicePreview;
